security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: PLC Ladder Diagram simulator with Modbus TCP
bundle.longDescription: Desktop PLC Ladder Diagram (LAD) editor and real-time simulator with built-in Modbus TCP slave for lab and SCADA integration. Not a certified safety PLC.
